title: Arched Sea-View Villa in Lombok
blurb: An architectural masterpiece defined by a sweeping arched silhouette, perched high on a Lombok hilltop — white stone floors, tropical wood accents, a large lap pool, and an uninterrupted panorama of the Indian Ocean from sunrise to sunset.
detail:
A truly stunning architectural retreat that marries a unique arched silhouette with natural materials — white stone floors and warm tropical wood accents. Perched high on a Lombok hilltop, the arched design lets you enjoy every minute of the day, with privacy and an incredible panoramic view of the Indian Ocean: from sunrise, the warm tropical light colours the façades in different tones through the day until the dramatic climax of sunset.

The villa holds four elegant bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms, inviting the whole family to an unforgettable retreat. Massive social spaces open to the view and to a refreshingly large lap pool, and wherever you venture there is a new corner to discover or a fresh angle to frame the sea.

Across roughly 1,584 m² over indoor and outdoor zones, additional spaces include a play room, an office and a dedicated yoga deck — with panoramic sea, sunrise, sunset and valley views from a peak position. A full guest-services team provides complimentary breakfast, daily housekeeping, turndown and 24-hour security, with in-villa dining, spa and tailored activities on request.
